hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '/dashboard/.*\.(ts|tsx)$'; then cd /home/kiddulu/Projects/WebAppBH/dashboard && npx eslint --fix "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi

file="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qE '/(base_tool|pipeline)\.py$|/tools/[^/]+\.py$'; then echo 'SECURITY-SENSITIVE FILE MODIFIED: Run the security-reviewer agent on this file before continuing.' >&2; fi

if [ -f /tmp/.webbh-code-reviewed ]; then rm -f /tmp/.webbh-code-reviewed; exit 0; else echo 'CODE REVIEW GATE: Run the code-reviewer agent on staged changes before committing. After review completes, retry the commit.' >&2; touch /tmp/.webbh-code-reviewed; exit 1; fi
